project.name: CARLOS
project.description: CARLOS EMR (Clinical Assisting Recording Ledger Open Source) is a web-based electronic medical record system for Canadian healthcare.

configuration.argLine: @{argLine} -Xmx2048m -Dnet.bytebuddy.experimental=true --add-opens java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.lang.reflect=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/sun.reflect=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/sun.nio.ch=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.io=ALL-UNNAMED --add-opens java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED
